content:
type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: IDCG fix complete: changed idcg calculation to iterate over len(expected_set) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) at lines ~380-385 in NDCG.compute. Removed the now-unused 'ideal_length' variable. Note: this changes the score for cases where relevant docs > retrieved docs (previously normalized to 1.0 for perfect-within-retrieved, now correctly < 1.0 since IDCG accounts for all relevant docs). File is free for you to edit now.
